title: Single source settlement_commands DDL
intent: Schema initialization uses one canonical settlement_commands DDL source so that future schema evolution has a single edit-point and inline duplicates cannot drift.

asserted_invariants.text: Repo grep for 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS settlement_commands' returns exactly one definition site (src/execution/settlement_commands.py).
src/state/db.py imports SETTLEMENT_COMMAND_SCHEMA (or an init helper) from src/execution/settlement_commands and does not redefine the DDL inline.
Existing tests (tests/test_settlement_commands.py) pass unchanged; init_schema() still creates settlement_commands and settlement_command_events with identical column shapes.

duplicate_DDL_sites: src/execution/settlement_commands.py:28 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS settlement_commands
src/state/db.py:1398 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS settlement_commands
_planner_notes.circular_import_risk: init_schema() in db.py is module-level; importing from src.execution.settlement_commands at module-load time may pull in execution-side dependencies. Mitigation: function-scope import inside init_schema() (per MASTER_PLAN_v2 §10 T1A 'function-scope import if needed').
_planner_notes.topology_admission: BLOCKED at planner time — generic profile does not admit src/state/db.py. T1A executor MUST run the topology gate at GO_BATCH_1 time and stop if rejected. Operator may need to add an 'r3 settlement command schema unification' digest profile before dispatch.
operator_only_blockers_at_planner_time: T0.2 RiskGuard still RUNNING (PID 14177); operator must unload before dispatch.
T0.3 venue quiescence not yet attested.
